dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6417 IH: Emergency Savings Enhancement Act of 2025
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Vindman (for himself and Mr. Thompson of Pennsylvania) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Education and Workforce, and in addition to the Committee on Ways and Means, for a period to be subsequently determined by the Speaker, in each case for consideration of such provisions as fall within the jurisdiction of the committee concerned

form.official-title: To modify the eligibility requirements and account contribution maximum for pension-linked emergency savings accounts, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Emergency Savings Enhancement Act of 2025.

section.header: Amendments to the Employee Retirement Income Security Act of 1974
section.text: Section 801 of the Employee Retirement Income Security Act of 1974 (29 U.S.C. 1193) is amended—

paragraph.text: by striking subsection (b) and inserting the following:

subsection.text: For purposes of this part, the term eligible participant, with regard to an individual account plan, means an individual who meets any age, service, and other eligibility requirements of the plan.

subparagraph.text: in paragraph (1)(A)(i), by striking $2,500 and inserting $5,000; and

clause.text: in clause (vii), by adding and at the end;
in clause (viii), by striking ; and and inserting a period; and

section.header: Amendments to the Internal Revenue Code of 1986

subsection.text: Paragraph (2) of section 402A(e) of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 is amended to read as follows:

paragraph.text: For purposes of this subsection, the term eligible participant, with regard to a defined contribution plan, means an individual, without regard to whether the individual is otherwise a participant in such plan, who meets any age, service, and other eligibility requirements of the plan.

subsection.text: Clause (i) of section 402A(e)(3)(A) of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 is amended by striking $2,500 and inserting $5,000.

Subparagraph (A) of section 402A(e)(5) of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 is amended by adding and at the end of clause (vii), by striking ; and at the end of clause (viii) and inserting a period, and by striking clause (ix).

section.text: The amendments made by sections 2 and 3 shall apply to taxable years beginning after December 31, 2026.
